name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve aicite
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug

---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened. Include error messages, logs, or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Rust version**: [e.g., 1.75.0]
- **aicite version**: [e.g., 0.1.0 or commit hash]
- **LLM provider**: [e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, local]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. Configuration files (with API keys removed), relevant logs, or related issues.
